scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field1]@[field2] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Supported: join, replaces, sdp-anat, timer Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port] Supported: replaces Record-Route: <sip:10.133.39.159:6042;transport=udp;lr;av-asset-uid=1e96483e> Record-Route: <sip:127.0.0.2:15060;transport=udp;ibmsid=local.1600339179077_64901241_64901640;lr;ibmdrr> Record-Route: <sip:192.168.56.202:6037;ibmsid=local.1600339179077_64901241_64901640;lr;ibmdrr> Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test P-Asserted-Identity: <sip:+499511814633@bt.com> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1509186683 1 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 a=avf:avc=n prio=n a=csup:avf-v0 m=audio 41532 RTP/AVP 8 101 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=ptime:20

PRACK [$1] SIP/2.0 Via:SIP/2.0/transport=[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$2] To:[$3] Call-ID:[call_id] CSeq: 2 PRACK RAck: 1 1 INVITE Contact:<sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards:70 [routes] Subject:Performance Test Content-Type:application/sdp Content-Length:[len]

ACK sip:reddy2@192.168.56.202:6037 SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=UDP Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];rport;branch=[branch] From: sipp <sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sut <sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: 1-26145@10.133.39.159 CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Replaces:[call_id];from-tag=1;to-tag=1 Supported: 100rel Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 1 17 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] b=AS:64 t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 96 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:96 telephone-event/8000 a=sendrecv

ACK [$9] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> CSeq: 1 ACK [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
ACK sip:reddy2@10.133.48.87:5060 SIP/2.0 [last_Via:] [last_Call-ID:] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=UDP Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0
-->
